positive: A minimalist and sophisticated illustration of a soaring mountain landscape viewed through a stylized geometric window. The composition features clean silhouettes of jagged peaks and winding rivers, set against a gradient sky that transitions from deep indigo at the top to soft coral at the bottom. The style should evoke elegant linocut art meets brutalist architecture, using bold black outlines and limited, high-contrast color blocking. Focus on dynamic verticality and strong negative space. Suitable for a centered, high-impact t-shirt print.
